Package ru.nsu.fit.oop.melnikov.calculator.operations

Class Operation

java.lang.Object
ru.nsu.fit.oop.melnikov.calculator.operations.Operation
Direct Known Subclasses:
Cos, Deg, Divide, E, I, Log, Minus, Multiply, Pi, Plus, Pow, Sin, Sqr, Sqrt
public abstract class Operation extends Object
Super-class for each operation that can be supported by calculator.
